profiles.name: Signal Runner
rumors: Dead Rail is hot tonight. Move fast and don't glow.
Some walls aren't walls. Some walls are keys.
The scanners are tracking movement patterns, not names.

profiles.name: Candle Broker
rumors: Every green candle buys one more hour of rebellion.
Whales fake strength. Streets fake weakness.
The next prophecy arc is already leaking into the tape.

profiles.name: Fork Warden
rumors: Chain Plaza belongs to whoever can hold it under noise.
Too many tags in one block wakes the drones faster.
Moon Gate only opens for those willing to lose something.

profiles.name: Prophecy Oracle
rumors: Satellite Fall still echoes in circuits that were never repaired.
Meme Plague begins as a joke and ends as infrastructure.
New Dawn is not peace. It is a different kind of war.
